notes: Performance and reliability update for limited newsroom testing.
Hardware-accelerated video conversion when available, with automatic software fallback (typically several times faster).
Faster downloads: video segments download in parallel.
Self-updating downloader engine: user-initiated, checksum-verified, revertable.
Plain-English error messages with recovery tips.
Per-download timing shown on completed items (local only).
Crash reporting file and a Report a problem button.
